details.test: Task 1: Add affordable lunch restaurants to comparison list
Task 2: Join cheapest business membership plan for 5 employees
Task 3: Register for earliest morning networking event under 25 within 30 days
Task 4: Contact a top business via directory search
Task 5: Select gala sponsorship under 1000 with logo on website
Task 6: Add recent social media marketing guides to reading list
Task 7: Save retail deals with at least 15 percent discount expiring this month
Task 8: Post full-time Sales Associate job listing with salary range
Task 9: Send volunteer inquiry addressed to Volunteer Coordinator
